query:
SELECT serviceId, planName, supplierName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName,
  LEFT(discoveryNotes, 100) as notePreview
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%SIM Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Data Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup Internet%'
)
AND (monthlyCost = 0.00 OR monthlyCost = 49.00)
ORDER BY monthlyCost, planName;
